mapper.select:
SELECT mg.id AS merchantGoodsId, mg.merchant_id AS merchantId, spu.brand_id AS brandId, spu.category_id AS categoryId, mg.sku_id AS skuId, spu.spu_name AS spuName, sku.sku_name AS skuName, sku.spec_text AS specText, mg.sale_price AS salePrice, CASE WHEN cpr.special_price IS NOT NULL THEN cpr.special_price WHEN ldr_sku.discount_rate IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(mg.sale_price * ldr_sku.discount_rate / 10, 2) WHEN ldr_brand.discount_rate IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(mg.sale_price * ldr_brand.discount_rate / 10, 2) WHEN ldr_category.discount_rate IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(mg.sale_price * ldr_category.discount_rate / 10, 2) ELSE NULL END AS memberPrice, cpr.special_price AS customerPrice, mg.current_cost_price AS costPrice, CASE WHEN mg.supplier_id IS NOT NULL THEN LEAST(COALESCE(mg.stock_qty, sku.stock_qty), sku.stock_qty) ELSE COALESCE(mg.stock_qty, sku.stock_qty, 0) END AS stockQty, mg.main_image_id AS mainImageId, mg.freight_amount AS freightAmount, TRUE AS authorized FROM merchant_goods mg JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = mg.sku_id AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_supplier_relation relation_row ON relation_row.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND relation_row.supplier_id = mg.supplier_id AND relation_row.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN supplier_goods_authorization auth_row ON auth_row.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND auth_row.supplier_id = mg.supplier_id AND auth_row.supplier_sku_id = mg.sku_id AND auth_row.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN customer_price_rule cpr ON cpr.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND cpr.customer_id = #{customerId} AND cpr.sku_id = mg.sku_id AND cpr.deleted = 0 AND cpr.status = 'ENABLED' AND (cpr.start_time IS NULL OR cpr.start_time <= NOW()) AND (cpr.end_time IS NULL OR cpr.end_time >= NOW()) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT merchant_id, member_level, target_type, target_id, discount_rate FROM level_discount_rule WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ENABLED' AND member_level = #{memberLevel} AND (start_time IS NULL OR start_time <= NOW()) AND (end_time IS NULL OR end_time >= NOW()) ) ldr_sku ON ldr_sku.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND ldr_sku.target_type = 'SKU' AND ldr_sku.target_id = mg.sku_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT merchant_id, member_level, target_type, target_id, discount_rate FROM level_discount_rule WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ENABLED' AND member_level = #{memberLevel} AND (start_time IS NULL OR start_time <= NOW()) AND (end_time IS NULL OR end_time >= NOW()) ) ldr_brand ON ldr_brand.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND ldr_brand.target_type = 'BRAND' AND ldr_brand.target_id = spu.brand_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT merchant_id, member_level, target_type, target_id, discount_rate FROM level_discount_rule WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ENABLED' AND member_level = #{memberLevel} AND (start_time IS NULL OR start_time <= NOW()) AND (end_time IS NULL OR end_time >= NOW()) ) ldr_category ON ldr_category.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND ldr_category.target_type = 'CATEGORY' AND ldr_category.target_id = spu.category_id WHERE mg.deleted = 0 AND mg.sale_status = 'ON' AND mg.id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_info ( order_no, customer_id, merchant_id, order_source, order_status, pay_status, shipment_status, aftersale_status, goods_amount, freight_amount, discount_amount, used_points, points_deduction_amount, pay_amount, cost_amount, profit_amount, pay_method, customer_remark, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_province, receiver_city, receiver_district, receiver_address, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{customerId}, #{merchantId}, #{orderSource}, #{orderStatus}, #{payStatus}, #{shipmentStatus}, #{aftersaleStatus}, #{goodsAmount}, #{freightAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{usedPoints}, #{pointsDeductionAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{costAmount}, #{profitAmount}, #{payMethod}, #{customerRemark}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverProvince}, #{receiverCity}, #{receiverDistrict}, #{receiverAddress}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )

INSERT INTO order_item ( order_id, merchant_goods_id, sku_id, spu_name, sku_name, spec_text, quantity, base_price, member_price, customer_price, final_unit_price, final_amount, cost_price, profit_amount ) VALUES
( #{item.orderId}, #{item.merchantGoodsId}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.spuName}, #{item.skuName}, #{item.specText}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.basePrice}, #{item.memberPrice}, #{item.customerPrice}, #{item.finalUnitPrice}, #{item.finalAmount}, #{item.costPrice}, #{item.profitAmount} )

INSERT INTO order_status_log ( order_id, old_status, new_status, operation_type, operator_id, operator_name, remark ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{oldStatus}, #{newStatus}, #{operationType}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS user_id, customer.id AS customer_id, COALESCE(customer.company_name, ma.member_name, u.nick_name, u.username) AS customer_name, customer.member_level AS member_level FROM sys_user u JOIN member_account ma ON ma.id = u.member_id AND ma.deleted = 0 AND ma.status = 'ENABLED' AND ma.member_type = 'CUSTOMER' JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.member_id = ma.id AND customer.deleted = 0 AND customer.status = 'ENABLED' WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id AS user_id, merchant.id AS merchant_id, COALESCE(merchant.shop_name, ma.member_name, u.nick_name, u.username) AS operator_name FROM sys_user u JOIN member_account ma ON ma.id = u.member_id AND ma.deleted = 0 AND ma.status = 'ENABLED' AND ma.member_type = 'MERCHANT' JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.member_id = ma.id AND merchant.deleted = 0 AND merchant.status = 'ENABLED' WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.customer_id, o.merchant_id, o.order_status, o.pay_status, o.shipment_status, o.pay_amount, COALESCE(s.tracking_no, '-') AS tracking_no FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN shipment_info s ON s.order_id = o.id WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.id = #{orderId} AND o.customer_id = #{customerId} LIMIT 1

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.customer_id, o.merchant_id, o.order_status, o.pay_status, o.shipment_status, o.pay_amount, COALESCE(s.tracking_no, '-') AS tracking_no FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN shipment_info s ON s.order_id = o.id WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.id = #{orderId} AND o.merchant_id = #{merchantId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_record ( order_id, aftersale_id, record_type, pay_method, pay_amount, voucher_file_id, transaction_no, pay_status, confirmed_by, confirmed_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, NULL, #{recordType}, #{payMethod}, #{payAmount}, #{voucherFileId}, #{transactionNo}, #{payStatus}, #{confirmedBy}, #{confirmedTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_record SET pay_status = #{payStatus}, confirmed_by = #{confirmedBy}, confirmed_time = NOW(), remark = CASE WHEN #{remark} IS NULL OR #{remark} = '' THEN remark ELSE #{remark} END WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND record_type = 'PAY' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

UPDATE order_info SET order_status = #{orderStatus}, pay_status = IF(#{payStatus} IS NULL, pay_status, #{payStatus}), shipment_status = IF(#{shipmentStatus} IS NULL, shipment_status, #{shipmentStatus}), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shipment_info ( order_id, ship_status, carrier_name, tracking_no, proof_file_id, ship_time, sign_time, logistics_remark, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{shipStatus}, #{carrierName}, #{trackingNo}, #{proofFileId}, #{shipTime}, NULL, #{logisticsRemark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ship_status = VALUES(ship_status), carrier_name = VALUES(carrier_name), tracking_no = VALUES(tracking_no), ship_time = VALUES(ship_time), logistics_remark = VALUES(logistics_remark), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO product_stock_log ( sku_id, change_type, change_qty, before_qty, after_qty, biz_type, biz_id, remark, operated_by ) VALUES ( #{skuId}, #{changeType}, #{changeQty}, #{beforeQty}, #{afterQty}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{remark}, #{operatedBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) AS orderItemId, sku_id AS skuId, quantity AS quantity, final_unit_price AS finalUnitPrice, final_amount AS finalAmount, cost_price AS costPrice, profit_amount AS profitAmount, spu_name AS spuName, sku_name AS skuName, spec_text AS specText FROM order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item_adjust_log ( order_id, order_item_id, old_quantity, new_quantity, old_final_unit_price, new_final_unit_price, old_final_amount, new_final_amount, operator_id, operator_name, remark ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{orderItemId}, #{oldQuantity}, #{newQuantity}, #{oldFinalUnitPrice}, #{newFinalUnitPrice}, #{oldFinalAmount}, #{newFinalAmount}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE order_info SET goods_amount = #{goodsAmount}, cost_amount = #{costAmount}, profit_amount = #{profitAmount}, pay_amount = #{payAmount}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{orderId} AND deleted = 0
